reviews.review_title: Its excatly the kinda game i’ve been was
reviews.review_description:
It can be a little hard to get the hang of but boy when you do
It feels good

Only thing missing is costom and mayby a story mode

But i’ll definitly reccoment it
Espicially if you like Harry potter

The concept is there and everything functions well. My only complaint would be is there isn’t like any sort of progression of anything like that. You just go in and do the same thing over and over again.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! I'm currently in the early stages of development, and I'm working on adding more progression elements in future updates! There’s currently one achievement that rewards you with the dual wield option, but there’s a lot more to come!

Your feedback is incredibly valuable as it helps me prioritize what to focus on next. If you have any specific ideas or suggestions for how you'd like to see progression implemented, I'd love to hear them!
